item.title: WorldSnookerFed: WPBSA reposteó World Snooker Federation @WorldSnookerFed · 12h Well done to Stan Moody and Liam Pullen, who have secure
item.description:
WPBSA reposteó World Snooker Federation @WorldSnookerFed · 12h Well done to Stan Moody and Liam Pullen, who have secured their Crucible Theatre debuts this evening at the World Championship qualifiers!
The two met in the WSF Junior Championship final in Australia just three years ago 2 7 464

item.title:

item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 28min JUDGEMENT DAY DRAMA RETURNS FOR DAY 2!
Watch LIVE from 10:50AM BST (YouTube with ads, WST PLAY ad-free) - with 2023 World Champion Luca Brecel headlining the action.
#JudgementDay 8 24 1 mil
